div.span:
Idea entity
open to triaged to incorporated

Mission entity
proposed to active to completed

Messages and pulses
status checks and escalation

Task / plannedTasks cascade
when formal task path is used

Verify execution readiness
when claim lane applies

Claim wave or task
implement work

Open PR
maintain work trace
respond to review

Design Survey questions
interpret response matrix

Flip Mission active
after Director ratification

Dispatch waves
coordinate cross-approval
admin-merge when warranted

Mediation invariant:
Director and Engineer routine mechanics route through Architect
